Travel to the Converted Tower and go inside to pick up Cuckoo Glintstone x5 from a desk.
Behind the tower is a corpse with Magic Grease x2.
Climb the walls surrounding the tower and double jump onto the stairs to get inside. Open the chest at the top to obtain a Memory Stone.
Head toward the Minor Erdtree northwest of the tower and kill the Erdtree Avatar for Cerulean Crystal Tear, Ruptured Crystal Tear and 5,800 runes.
In the lower area past the Erdtree, near the cliff, you'll see a downward slope. Kill the scarab on the slope to obtain Ash of War: Sword Dance.
Continue down the slope to discover the entrance to Road's End Catacombs:
Go inside and grab the Road's End Catacombs grace.
Pull the boss lever in the first room, then pick up the Grave Glovewort [2] and 2x Grave Glovewort [3] below.
Hit the illusory wall next to the second staircase to find a Grave Glovewort [3], Human Bone Shard x5 and the Watchdog's Staff.
Pick up Grave Glovewort [2] in an alcove in the corridor ahead.
In the room past the corridor, you can find a Grave Glovewort [2] and a Grave Glovewort [3].
Hit the illusory wall at the end to discover a chest with the Raya Lucaria Soldier Ashes.
Return to the first room and hit the illusory wall next to the first staircase. Inside you'll find a Ghost Glovewort [2] and a Rune Arc.
Go through the narrow path to find Root Resin x3, then hit the illusory wall behind it.
Pick up the Grave Glovewort [2] at the end, then hit the illusory wall behind it to reveal the boss room.
Kill the Spiritcaller Snail for Glintstone Sorcerer Ashes and 3,000 runes.
Exit the catacombs, then at the top of the slope, head north-northeast toward a shack. Quickly grab the Revenger's Shack grace in front of it as you get invaded.
MISSABLE: Kill Edgar for a Shabriri Grape, Banished Knight's Halberd+8, and Raw Meat Dumpling x5.
Note: You can remove the ash of war from his weapon to obtain Ash of War: Spinning Strikes.
Grab the 5x Raw Meat Dumpling inside the Revenger's Shack; they only spawn if Edgar invades.
Kill Bols, Carian Knight in the evergaol past the shack for Greatblade Phalanx and 4,600 runes.
Optional: Kill the Operatic Bat beneath the tall rock north of the evergoal for a Golden Rune [6] (first time).
Follow the dirt path next to the tall rock to discover the Foot of the Four Belfries grace on the left side.
Loot the Blood Grease x3 and Jellyfish Shield next to a wagon on the road north of the grace.
Continue north toward a camp. In the lower section you can find a Rune Arc and a chest with Cuckoo Glintstone x10.
In the upper part of the camp, to the left of a Pumpkin Head, are two chests you can loot for Albinauric Bloodclot x6 and Smithing Stone [4].
Follow the path in the woods south-southeast of the chests to a fork, then follow the east path all the way up to The Four Belfries grace at the top.
Loot the chest near the grace to obtain an Imbued Sword Key.
Requires 1 Imbued Sword Key: Unlock the imp-sealed belfry marked by the message "Precipice of Anticipation":
Use the sending gate and kill the Grafted Scion for Ornamental Straight Sword, Golden Beast Crest Shield, and 3,200 runes.
Continue to the chapel where you first started out and go through the previously closed side entrance to pick up The Stormhawk King.
Loot the chest in the chapel to obtain Stormhawk Deenh.
Return to Foot of the Four Belfries and head past the camp to encounter a caravan with the Carian Knight's Sword.
Head east from the camp's exit to find a chair with a Somber Smithing Stone [3].
In front of a wagon below the cliff lies a corpse with Throwing Dagger x6.
Head southeast from the wagon to find a cemetery with 2x Golden Rune [1], 3x Golden Rune [2], 5x Golden Rune [3], 2x Golden Rune [4], and a Golden Rune [5].
Pop the balloon northeast of the cemetery to receive a Golden Rune [6].
Continue toward the island and grab the Sorcerer's Isle grace on a ledge by the water.
Examine the book in front of Testu's Rise to activate the three beasts:
#1: At the cliff edge just north of the book. [Location 1]
#2: Hanging onto the back of a tree behind the tower. Use a ranged weapon or throwing knife. [Location 2]
#3: Found below the edge to the right of the tower when facing the entrance. [Location 3]
Loot the chest at the top of the tower to obtain a Memory Stone.
Pop the four balloons on the side of the island for 4x Golden Rune [6].
Underneath the large ruin behind the island lies a corpse with Old Fang x2, surrounded by Land Squirts.
East of the ruin lies a campsite with Lump of Flesh.
From the campsite, head northwest to some ruins with Soporific Grease x3 in between.
Up a short cliff northwest of the ruins, on a ledge in the corner of the area, you'll find a basin with the Intelligence-knot Crystal Tear.
Optional: Kill the large Fingercreeper burrowed in the ground near the basin for a Somber Smithing Stone [2] (first time).
Head east-southeast from the basin until you see a chair on your left with a Somber Smithing Stone [4].
Continue east to discover The Ravine grace in front of a ravine.
Go through the ravine to find a Golden Seed at the other side.
Pick up the Smithing Stone [5] in a shack, then grab the Ravine-Veiled Village grace behind it.
In the water just northwest of the grace is a scarab that drops Ash of War: Barbaric Roar.
Travel to Road to the Manor, then turn around to explore Kingsrealm Ruins:
Pick up the Rimed Crystal Bud x8 in the tower southwest of the grace.
In the lower part of the ruins, you can find a corpse with Glintstone Firefly x4.
Roll through the hidden cellar just north-northeast of the corpse and kill the Royal Revenant for 3,100 runes.
Note: As with any Revenant, attempting to heal the boss will instead deal significant damage, making the fight laughably easy.
Loot the chest past the boss to obtain the Frozen Needle.
Return to the grace, then head up the north-northwest slope to a cemetery with Golden Rune [1], Golden Rune [2], 4x Golden Rune [3], Golden Rune [4], and a Golden Rune [5].
Approach Caria Manor while dodging the enchanted snare to grab the Main Caria Manor Gate grace outside the entrance.
Kill the invisible scarab in the pond east-southeast of the manor gate to obtain Ash of War: Hoarfrost Stomp.
Cross the bridge-like rock that extends past the cliff, then go up the slope on the other side to find the Nomadic Merchant (North Liurnia).
Continue up the slope to a church. Grab the Bellum Church grace and the Sacred Tear in front of a statue.
